data.name: FUTANARI
data.detailed_description:
Sometimes, you just want a girl who brings her own equipment to the party. 🍆

FUTANARI is a classic arcade brick-breaker with a heavy surprise. We’ve taken the retro gameplay you know—bouncing balls and hard paddles—and added a reward system that packs a serious punch.

The goal is simple: keep your balls in play, smash through the barriers, and clear the stage. But unlike the arcades of the 80s, your high score isn't just a number. Every victory unlocks a steaming hot video featuring the "best of both worlds."

🍆 Key Features:

  • Hard-Hitting Gameplay: Classic arcade physics where you handle the paddle to keep the action going.

  • The Full Package: Unlock high-quality, uncensored videos featuring Futa x Girl and Futa x Futa action.

  • Banging Soundtrack: We know you need the right rhythm to finish. Enjoy a high-energy, thematic OST that keeps the beats pumping as hard as the action on screen.

  • Play With One Hand: Simple mouse controls let you focus on the... visuals... while keeping one hand free.

  • Gallery Mode: Replay your favorite unlocked scenes anytime you want to review your "achievements."

Can you handle the extra load? Turn up the volume, grab your paddle, and find out.

data.short_description: A retro-style arcade breaker where the surprise is bigger than you expect. Bounce your balls to a banging soundtrack, smash through barriers, and unlock the "full package"—featuring explicit videos of girls with something extra. 🍆
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
